summary: Verified search improvements: 1) Global search AND logic returns 9 relevant ME! variants instead of 255 unrelated Taylor Swift variants - MAJOR improvement. 2) ISO modal 'View More' button works correctly, showing count of remaining results. 3) Discogs structured search fallback returns ME! album at top of results.

backend_search_variants_me_taylor_swift.details: GET /api/search/variants?q=me!+taylor+swift returns ~9 results (down from 255). AND logic working - each word must match at least one field.

backend_search_variants_taylor_swift_bro.details: GET /api/search/variants?q=taylor+swift still returns Taylor Swift variants - broad queries still work.

backend_search_variants_radiohead_ok_com.details: GET /api/search/variants?q=radiohead+ok+computer returns OK Computer variants at top - AND logic filtering correctly.

backend_discogs_search_me_taylor_swift.details: GET /api/discogs/search?q=me!+taylor+swift returns 40 results with ME! by Taylor Swift in top 5 positions. Structured search fallback working.

frontend_iso_modal_search.details: ISO modal search shows Discogs results with album art. 6 results shown initially with 'View More' button.

frontend_iso_modal_view_more.details: 'View More' button appears with remaining count (e.g., '14 remaining'). Clicking it loads 6 more results (tested: 6 -> 12 results).

frontend_iso_modal_selection.details: Selecting a Discogs result shows preview with album art, title, artist, year and 'Change' button.

frontend_global_search_me_taylor_swift.details: Global search /search?q=me!+taylor+swift shows 9 Variants section results - all ME! (2019) by Taylor Swift with album art. Albums and Artists sections also populated correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Search improvements verified: 1) _build_and_filter() helper in routes/search.py implements AND logic where each search word must match at least one field. 2) /api/discogs/search has structured search fallback using release_title+artist params. 3) ISO modal shows 6 results initially with 'View More' button using discogsShowCount state in ISOPage.js. All tests pass.
